guest.hero_title: Nothing is waste until you give up on it.
guest.hero_desc: One platform to share objects, create value, and reduce waste together.
guest.reality_title: The sad reality: waste is everywhere
guest.reality_desc: Every minute, tons of usable objects are thrown away while resources become scarcer.
guest.mission_desc: A common space where we connect to give materials a second life.
guest.step1_title: Give or sell objects you no longer use
guest.step1_card1_desc: Find items you no longer need
guest.step1_card3_desc: A pro will buy and collect it
guest.step2_subtitle: Don’t have time to meet? Deposit your objects in our smart containers.
guest.step3_subtitle: Discover our latest guides, events, workshops, and much more !
guest.cta_title: Are you hyped up to upcycle and save our planet?
guest.cta_subtitle: Join a community of thousands making reuse the new standard.
guest.pro_title: Are you a Professional or Artisan?
guest.pro_subtitle: Looking for materials for your next upcycling project?
guest.pro_source_item2: Smart alerts for specific material arrivals
guest.pro_grow_item1: Promote your upcycling projects to our community
guest.pro_grow_item2: Reach new audiences interested in sustainability
guest.pro_grow_item3: Build local B2B and B2C partnerships
guest.pro_grow_item4: Track your impact via Upcycling Score
